name: Skye Bioscience, Inc.
summary: . Overview Skye Bioscience, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company pioneering next-generation molecules that modulate G-protein-coupled receptors ("GPCRs") to treat obesity, overweight, and metabolic disorders. Our lead candidate, nimacimab, is a peripherally restricted negative allosteric modulating antibody targeting cannabinoid receptor 1 ("CB1")a key GPCR involved in metabolic regulation.
